name: tool.os.web
description: Search the web and fetch content from URLs. Use 'search' to find information on the internet and 'fetch' to retrieve the content of a specific web page or API endpoint.

search.description: Search the web for information. Returns a list of results with titles, URLs, and snippets. Uses DuckDuckGo by default or a custom search API via SEARCH_API_URL env var. Example: search query='latest Node.js LTS version'.

query.description: Search query string. Example: 'TypeScript 5 new features'

num_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default: 5. Max: 20.

error.description: Error message if the search failed

fetch.description: Fetch content from a URL. Supports GET (default), POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE methods. Returns the response body, status code, and headers. Use for retrieving web pages, calling REST APIs, or downloading text content. Example: fetch url='https://api.github.com/repos/nodejs/node' to get repo info.

url.description: Full URL to fetch. Must start with http:// or https://. Example: 'https://api.github.com/repos/nodejs/node'

headers.description: HTTP request headers as key-value pairs. Example: { "Authorization": "Bearer token", "Content-Type": "application/json" }

body.description: Request body for POST/PUT/PATCH. Send JSON as a string.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. Default: 30. Max: 120.

max_response_bytes.description: Maximum response body size in bytes. Default: 1048576 (1MB). Truncates if exceeded.

truncated.description: True if the response body was truncated due to max_response_bytes

error.description: Error message if the fetch failed
